ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield, 2024-25 Final: Victoria vs South Australia

summary: The Sheffield Shield 2024-25 Final between Victoria and South Australia concluded today, March 29, 2026, with South Australia striking late on day four to leave the title clash on a knife's edge. No current live matches were found for Chandigarh T20 or AFC U20 Asian Cup.
